prompt: Fill the bubble with: “Careful!” in bold
prompt_refined: Edit image 2. In the dark rectangular area located at the bottom-center of the image, replace the current content with the text "Careful!". The text "Careful!" must be rendered in a bold font. The new text should be enclosed within a speech bubble that precisely matches the shape, color, and overall style of the speech bubble present in image 1, maintaining its approximate position.
